# IPRECON 2026

> IPRECON 2026 is the IEEE International Power and Renewable Energy Conference, a hybrid (in-person and online) academic conference on power systems and renewable energy, held 4-6 September 2026 at College of Engineering Karunagappally, Kerala, India.

## Key facts

- Event: IEEE International Power and Renewable Energy Conference (IPRECON 2026)
- Dates: 4-6 September 2026
- Venue: College of Engineering Karunagappally, Kerala, India
- Mode: Hybrid (in-person and online)
- Notification of acceptance: 30 June 2026
- Final camera-ready paper: 31 July 2026
- Early-bird registration deadline: 30 June 2026 (regular fee applies from 1 July 2026)
- Registration: https://iprecon.org/registration.html

## Primary pages

- [Home](https://iprecon.org/): Conference overview and announcements
- [About IPRECON](https://iprecon.org/about-iprecon.html): About the conference
- [Call for Papers](https://iprecon.org/cfp.html): Topics, scope, and submission details
- [Important Dates](https://iprecon.org/important-dates.html): Deadlines and key dates
- [Registration](https://iprecon.org/registration.html): Fees and how to register
- [Paper Submissions](https://iprecon.org/submissions.html): Submission instructions
- [Camera-Ready](https://iprecon.org/camera-ready.html): Final paper submission instructions
- [Tracks](https://iprecon.org/tracks.html): Technical tracks and topics
- [Committee](https://iprecon.org/committee.html): Organizing committee
- [Venue](https://iprecon.org/venue.html): Conference venue
- [Contact](https://iprecon.org/contact.html): Contact information
